Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Advanced From Feb-02-15 To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authorization For Trustee To Expend Trust Assets For Purchase Of Real Property, And For Approval Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for Wells Fargo Bank. Kathryn Steinbach and David DeLira (Parents of Beneficiary) also present.

Ms. Steneberg stated that the $700,000.00 amount came in conversation between the Trustee and the family members, that there is another trust pending and that the case is in settlement, that there is another $200,000.00 coming in and that no more funds are coming in from this settlement. Ms. Steneberg also stated that she is not sure if there will be a mortgage, that there may be a need for additional contributions from the family and that the family is well aware of their need for contribution of rent and expenses. In addition, Ms. Steneberg stated that they were hoping to not to do confirmation, that they have not done hard calculations as to what would be left in the trust and how it would play out to provide for the Beneficiary for the rest of his lifetime, and that there are lots of variables. Ms. Steinberg explained their finances. The Court granted the Petition for Authorization for Trustee to Expend Trust Assets for Purchase of Real Property, etc. subject to receipt and review of a revised order to request that the parents while living in the home are contributing to amounts towards rent and expenses in written form. Status regarding purchase of the real property and written agreement regarding rent and expenses was set for May 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
